stories.headline: Apple just announced the next version of Apple Intelligence and Siri
stories.blurb: Apple previewed updates coming to its AI platform and voice assistant at WWDC, though the company hasn't shared specific features or launch dates yet. The announcement signals Apple's continued push into on-device AI after launching Apple Intelligence last year.
stories.why_it_matters: Apple is doubling down on AI, but we'll need to wait for details on what's actually new.
stories.original_headline: Apple unveils next generation of Apple Intelligence, Siri AI, and more

stories.headline: Apple just rebuilt its AI stack on top of Google's Gemini
stories.blurb: Apple announced a new AI architecture that runs Google Gemini models under the hood, marking a major shift from its homegrown approach. The move puts Google's AI directly into Apple's ecosystem after years of the company insisting on building everything in-house.
stories.why_it_matters: Apple choosing Google over OpenAI (or its own models) reshapes the consumer AI landscape.
stories.original_headline: Apple reveals new AI architecture built around Google Gemini models

stories.headline: Alexa can now design custom T-shirts and mugs from a voice prompt
stories.blurb: Amazon rolled out AI-powered merch design in its shopping app. Ask Alexa for a tumbler with your dog's portrait or matching group shirts, and the assistant generates printable designs you can buy. The feature turns natural-language requests into physical products without opening a design tool.
stories.why_it_matters: Voice assistants just became storefront designers — no Canva skills required.
stories.original_headline: Customers can now design merch with Alexa for Shopping on Amazon

stories.headline: Cognition released a 34B coding model that beats Claude Sonnet on SWE-bench
stories.blurb: Cognition (the Devin AI coding agent company) open-sourced FrontierCode, a 34-billion-parameter model trained specifically for agentic software engineering. It scores 28.6% on SWE-bench Verified, outperforming Claude 3.5 Sonnet and matching models 5x its size. The model is Apache 2.0 licensed and available on Hugging Face.
stories.why_it_matters: A smaller, open-weight model now matches frontier performance on real-world coding tasks.

stories.headline: SpaceX just signed a $30 billion deal to power Google's AI
stories.blurb: Elon Musk's rocket company will provide AI computing infrastructure to Google for $920 million per month, SpaceX announced as it prepares to go public. The deal marks one of the largest AI infrastructure contracts disclosed to date.
stories.why_it_matters: SpaceX is now competing directly with cloud providers in the AI compute market.
stories.original_headline: SpaceX Has $30 Billion Deal to Provide Google With A.I. Computing Power

try_this_prompt.title: The hiring reverse-pitch
try_this_prompt.prompt: I'm interviewing someone tomorrow. I'll describe the role and what I know about them below. Now write the pitch they should give me for why they shouldn't take this job — the honest drawbacks, the skills they won't build, the better opportunity they're walking away from.
try_this_prompt.tool_hint: Reveals what you're actually selling and whether your role story holds up.
